adopted: openai#5 (MEDIUM): audited ALL load_findings( call sites — grep confirms the only one outside the loader/tests is INSIDE load_actionable_findings; all 4 actionable consumers route through the filter, no bypass.

openai#3/#9 + gemini: self-documenting — load_findings docstring now states it is the RAW/forensic path, actionable rollups MUST use load_actionable_findings, and session_id is intentionally excluded from the sentinel test (a real run_id = resolved run context regardless of session).
openai#1 (MEDIUM, sentinel-set drift): added test_sentinel_set_matches_iterate_run_id_guard pinning RUN_ID_SENTINELS == _iterate_run_id._RUN_ID_SENTINELS.
openai#7: trimmed public surface — dropped RUN_ID_SENTINELS from the package __init__ export (kept in _constants for is_sentinel_run).

openai#1/#4 + gemini#1 (None/missing run_id): verified already handled — is_sentinel_run uses str(run_id or '') (None -> '' -> sentinel) AND load_findings normalises a missing/null run_id to 'unknown'; test asserts (None, True). Tightened spec AC-1 wording to match the impl.
rejected: openai#2 / gemini#2 (drop LoadedFinding.is_sentinel property): KEPT. Directly tested, reads as a domain concept, parallels the existing sort_key property; _aggregates.py is 210 LOC — far under its 300 budget, so gemini's 'near budget' premise does not hold.

gemini#3 (operational ghost old-FAIL heads-up): acknowledged, no code change — un-masking an older real FAIL is INTENDED and pinned by test_collect_sentinel_does_not_mask_older_real_fail; it is a real finding the sentinel was masking, not a regression.
openai#8 (debug-count excluded sentinels): not adopted — raw load_findings + the new docstring already provide the forensic path; a counter adds complexity for marginal value.
overall: Both models: approach sound and appropriately scoped (read/rollup-layer filter is the right fix for both stale and future degenerate snapshots). High-value refinements (call-site audit, drift-pin test, self-documenting docstrings, surface trim) applied; leanness-only suggestions declined with rationale.
